heading: Interagency Energy Management Task Force
label: 8257 Interagency Energy Management Task Force
notes: Amendments1988— amended section generally, substituting provisions relating to creation of an Interagency Energy Management Task Force for provisions relating to energy audits and retrofitting of existing Federal buildings.Pub. L. 100–615
amendments: Amendments1988— amended section generally, substituting provisions relating to creation of an Interagency Energy Management Task Force for provisions relating to energy audits and retrofitting of existing Federal buildings.Pub. L. 100–615

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: To assist the interagency committee organized under to coordinate the activities of the Federal Government in promoting energy conservation and the efficient use of energy and in informing non-Federal entities of the Federal experience in energy conservation, the Secretary shall establish an Interagency Energy Management Task Force (hereafter in this section referred to as the “Task Force”).section 7266 of this title

children.heading: Members
children.label: b Members
children.text: The Task Force shall be composed of the chief energy managers of agencies represented on the interagency committee organized under .section 7266 of this title
assess the progress of the various agencies in achieving energy savings;

collect and disseminate information to agencies, States, local governments, and the public on effective survey techniques, innovative approaches to the efficient use of energy, incentive programs developed under , innovative contracting methods developed under subchapter VII of this chapter, the use of cogeneration facilities and renewable resources, and other technologies that promote the conservation and efficient use of energy;section 8256 of this title
coordinate energy surveys conducted by the agencies;
develop options for use in conserving energy;
report to the committee organized under ; andsection 7266 of this title

review, from time to time as may be necessary, the regulations relating to building temperature settings to determine whether changes in such regulations would be appropriate to assist in meeting the goals specified in .section 8253 of this title
